title: Rake Quicktongue
atAGlance: Rake Quicktongue is a courier-informant who translates Slagline Cant across guilds, markets, and militia blocks before misunderstandings turn bloody.
sageNotes: Rake talks like falling tools: fast, sharp, and dangerous if you stand in the wrong place. He learned cant in furnace alleys and turned it into a career carrying messages too subtle for official messengers and too urgent for tavern gossip. He can decode shift-wall marks at a glance and spot forged worker slang by a single misplaced verb. If Rake tells you a phrase was planted, assume someone wants a riot by midnight.
gameInformation: Use as a mobile clue source, linguistic specialist, or unreliable ally with excellent timing. He can decode cant graffiti, identify fake work orders, and bridge communication between hostile districts. Complication: Rake is paid by multiple sides and may withhold one crucial translation unless protected.
